title: Entity Look At Trading Player Behavior
description: Compels an entity to look at the player that is currently trading with the entity.

angle_of_view_horizontal.title: Angle Of View Horizontal
angle_of_view_horizontal.description: The angle in degrees that the mob can see rotated on the Y-axis (left-right).

angle_of_view_vertical.title: Angle Of View Vertical
angle_of_view_vertical.description: The angle in degrees that the mob can see rotated on the X-axis (up-down).

look_distance.title: Look Distance
look_distance.description: The distance in blocks from which the entity will look at the nearest entity.

look_time.title: Look Time
look_time.description: Time range to look at the nearest entity.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• villager: 2
• villager_v2: 7
• wandering_trader: 4

probability.title: Probability
probability.description: The probability of looking at the target. A value of 1.00 is 100%.
